mechanics.excerpt: Hit LOCATION (OPTIONAL RULE) In the standard combat rules, attacks hit various parts of the body; but the game makes no distinction between them_ The eftects of wounds are generalized represent the idea that some hit vital areas and others don"t The wound effects reflect general injury, without getting down to specifics of where each shot nits_ This optional rule allows players t0 work Out exactly where the target each attack lands.
